feed.title: Moderation-中庸
feed.subtitle: 时间会奖励坚持自我的人

entry.title: Test1
Math
entry.summary: [!note] 证明

entry.title: Demo
Readme
entry.content:
+++

graph LR  A[方形节点] --> B(圆角节点)  B --> C{条件判断}  C -->|是| D[结果1]  C -->|否| E[结果2]
sequenceDiagram  Alice->>Bob: 发送消息  Bob-->>Alice: 确认收到  Alice->>Bob: 发送文件  Bob-->>Alice: 文件已接收
gantt  title 项目计划  dateFormat YYYY-MM-DD  section 阶段A  任务1 :a1, 2023-10-01, 30d  任务2 :after a1, 20d  section 阶段B  任务3 :2023-11-01, 12d  任务4 : 24d
stateDiagram-v2[*] --> StillStill --> [*]Still --> MovingMoving --> StillMoving --> CrashCrash --> [*]
pie"Dogs" : 386"Cats" : 85"Rats" : 15
  journey    title My working day    section Go to work      Make tea: 5: Me      Go upstairs: 3: Me      Do work: 1: Me, Cat    section Go home      Go downstairs: 5: Me      Sit down: 3: Me
entry.summary:
+++

graph LR
  A[方形节点] --> B(圆角节点)
  B --> C{条件判断}
  C -->|是| D[结果1]
  C -->|否| E[结果2]

entry.title: Hello World
entry.summary: Welcome to Hexo! This is your very first post. Check documentation for

entry.title: Test
entry.summary: 我简直快要疯了.
